baseline.reason: The launcher-version preflight failed before baseline execution.

launcherPreflight.stderr: awk: fatal: cannot open file `/usr/local/pom.xml' for reading: No such file or directory

javaspecEnvironment.upstreamCommitSubject: fix: resolve launcher artifact from project version
javaspecEnvironment.launcherRequirement: The launcher derives repo_root as the parent of its own bin directory and reads repo_root/pom.xml to resolve the artifact version.
javaspecEnvironment.sealedProjectWrapperMount: Only the upstream launcher file was mounted at /usr/local/bin/javaspec; the upstream root POM was not mounted.
javaspecEnvironment.claimAssessment: CONFIRMED: launcher commit 33fb70a required its repository root POM, while the sealed project wrapper mounted only the launcher script. The wrapper failed before it could select the valid installed RC1 JAR.

postIncidentRepositoryState.head: bf1b5484ef04b2576898d207a672dd16954d5550
postIncidentRepositoryState.note: The wrapper was repaired before dataset recording. Dataset-writer did not modify or rerun it.

reproducer.historicalPrecondition: Use magrathea-pki commit 638a4d7c4db3b6c1cbf1457a2b2fbc3e62f5ecd2 with bin/javaspec SHA-256 21cefb68809e918c155fdc05779d72730830d941d37472e998712913820a35bf and upstream javaspec commit 33fb70ab0b2758e09af0692fbd193def4f1614be.
reproducer.expectedFailure: Exit 2 because the isolated launcher derives /usr/local as repo_root and cannot open /usr/local/pom.xml.
reproducer.safety: Do not revert the repaired project wrapper merely to replay this incident; use the sealed raw trace and historical Git objects.
